description_long: This lamppost features a tall, octagonal column with a pointed finial at the top and a wide, sturdy base for stability. Extending from the upper section of the post is a single, angular arm that supports a lantern-style lamp head, which is hexagonal with a peaked roof and glass panels. The lamp head is suspended from the arm, giving it a classic, slightly ornate appearance reminiscent of Victorian or early 20th-century street lighting. The post and arm are finished in a dark, matte gray, while the lamp head has a contrasting reddish-brown top. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for urban streets, parks, or pedestrian areas. The structure appears robust, likely made of metal, and is intended to be a fixed, permanent fixture.
description: A tall, dark gray lamppost with an octagonal base and a single lantern-style lamp head suspended from an angular arm. The lamp head features a reddish-brown top and classic, decorative styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height, octagonal base, and the lantern head centered and suspended from the arm.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the protruding arm and the lantern head hanging clearly to the left of the post.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the straight back of the post and the arm extending out of sight, with the lantern head mostly hidden.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view with the arm and lantern head visible on the right, showing the geometric structure of the post and base.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Hexagonal lantern with a peaked reddish-brown roof and glass panels, classic Victorian style.
